action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace, CIFAR-100N task with 40% label noise. Need to build classifier robust to noise. Analysis: Best approach is to use a strong pretrained model (CLIP ViT-B/16 or ConvNeXt-Tiny) and fine-tune with noise-robust techniques. Start with simple baseline using ConvNeXt-Tiny finetuned for a few epochs with standard CE to validate pipeline and measure time. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, predict.py. Use timm convnext_tiny pretrained, upscale 32x32 to 224x224, train ~3 epochs first.
